statusLine.command: JQ="$HOME/AppData/Local/Microsoft/WinGet/Links/jq.exe"; input=$(cat); dir=$(echo "$input" | "$JQ" -r '.workspace.current_dir'); model=$(echo "$input" | "$JQ" -r '.model.display_name'); pct=$(echo "$input" | "$JQ" -r '.context_window.remaining_percentage // "0"'); pct=${pct%.*}; n=$((pct/10)); bar=$(printf "█%.0s" $(seq 1 $n)); empty=$(printf "░%.0s" $(seq $((n+1)) 10)); if [ -n "$pct" ]; then printf '%s  |  %s  |  %s%s %d%%' "$dir" "$model" "$bar" "$empty" "$pct"; else printf '%s  |  %s' "$dir" "$model"; fi

hooks.command: cd "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}" && git add -A && git diff --cached --quiet || git commit -m "自动同步: $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')"
